name: MAGNUS

rewards.displayRate: 60 EDGE REWARD Points / Rs 200 upto Rs 2 lakh per calendar month, then 35 EDGE REWARD Points / Rs 200

rewards.displayCategory: Eligible spends up to Rs 1.5 lakh per calendar month
Eligible incremental spends above Rs 1.5 lakh per calendar month

domestic: Domestic lounge access requires minimum spends of Rs 50,000 in the previous 3 calendar months; the spend condition is waived for the month of issuance plus the next 3 calendar months.
international: Unlimited domestic and international lounge access applies to primary cardholder; guest visits are limited to 4 domestic guest visits per calendar year and 4 international guest visits per card anniversary year on Priority Pass.

exclusions: transactions excluded under Axis Bank Magnus Credit Card terms

specialSpendRules.notes: Rent spends are eligible only up to Rs 50,000 per calendar month for reward earn and spend-based fee waiver calculation.

joiningBenefitsValued.label: Welcome voucher worth Rs 12,500 from eligible options such as Luxe, The Postcard Hotels or Yatra after card activation with first spend within 30 days

joiningBenefits: Welcome voucher worth Rs 12,500 from eligible options such as Luxe, The Postcard Hotels or Yatra after card activation with first spend within 30 days
milestoneBenefits: Annual fee waiver on spends of Rs 25 lakh in the preceding card anniversary year
For eligible older customers, historical waiver thresholds may differ as per Axis terms
additionalBenefits: Dining Delights offers across partner restaurants
Fuel surcharge waiver of 1% for transactions between Rs 400 and Rs 4,000, capped at Rs 400 per month

transferPartnerValuations.note: 5 EDGE REWARD Points -> 2 Club ITC points

salaried: Minimum annual income (ITR) of Rs 18 Lakhs, or net monthly salary of Rs 1.5 Lakhs
Card approval remains subject to Axis Bank credit policy
selfEmployed: Minimum annual income (ITR) of Rs 18 Lakhs
Card approval remains subject to Axis Bank credit policy

internalNotes: Card details manually reviewed and verified by user on 2026-06-06
Official audit completed on 2026-06-06 using Axis Bank product page, 20 April 2024 revision PDF, 20 June 2025 revision PDF, and Axis miles-transfer page.
Domestic lounge access requires minimum spends of Rs 50,000 in the previous 3 calendar months; the spend condition is waived for the month of issuance plus the next 3 calendar months.

Unlimited domestic and international lounge access applies to primary cardholder; guest visits are limited to 4 domestic guest visits per calendar year and 4 international guest visits per card anniversary year on Priority Pass.
Travel EDGE earns 60 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200 up to cumulative spends of Rs 2 lakh per calendar month; spends above that continue at 35 EDGE REWARD Points per Rs 200.
Accelerated 35 EDGE REWARD Points are earned only on eligible incremental spends above Rs 1.5 lakh in a calendar month, up to assigned credit limit plus Rs 1.5 lakh per calendar month.

Spends on Travel EDGE up to Rs 2 lakh per month, Gyftr, and other Axis accelerated offer portals are excluded from the 35-point accelerated calculation because they already earn separate accelerated rewards.
Rent spends above Rs 50,000 in a calendar month are not considered for accelerated reward points or spend-based fee waiver calculation.
EMI transactions, reversed transactions, fees, charges, interest, and cash withdrawals do not count toward accelerated reward calculations.

Miles transfer ratio for standard Magnus is 5 EDGE REWARD Points = 2 partner points (0.4 ratio) for standard partners, and 5 EDGE REWARD Points = 1 partner point (0.2 ratio) for British Airways, Finnair, and Vietnam Airlines.
Current annual transfer cap is 5 lakh EDGE REWARD Points in a calendar year, split as 1 lakh to Group A and 4 lakh to Group B.
Accor Live Limitless, Marriott Bonvoy, and Qatar Airways have been removed from the current transfer partner set.
Gift EDGE redemption is valued at Rs 0.20 per EDGE REWARD Point.
